claim_boundary_snapshot.forbidden_overclaim_boundary: no manuscript claim is active until a fresh S00/S01/S04 intake promotes evidence and claim wording

pilot_note: Deterministic local-paper pilot projection. It validates stage wiring and material boundaries without mutating or claiming completion of the source manuscript.
purpose: Define permissions, route governance, and state controls before automation.

stage_local_overlays.authority_boundary: stage-local overlay only; controller-only routing; controller retains completion authority
